---
title: "Class Notes"
---

I will post the weekly notes taken by the classroom notetakers, in case others
would like to go back over the ideas that were discussed. 

- Week 2 (Dr. T forgot)
  * [Introduction Discussion Questions](/discussion-questions/introduction-discussion-questions.docx)

- Week 3: [Chapter 1 Discussion Questions & Notes](/discussion-questions/class-notes/week-2-discussion-notes.docx)
